titleStmt.title: SII 9.130: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 130. (A.R. No. 35 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE BASTI AT KOGALI HADAGALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is not dated; it belongs to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Traiḷōkyamalladēva. Noḷambaseṭṭi, the servant of Traiḷōkyamalla-Nanni-Noḷamba-Permānaḍi, and Padmāvati-Abbe are said to have granted a land for a free feeding house in the presence of certain Gāvuṇḍas, the Nakharas of Kōgaḷi and the ninetysix-thousand. On palaeographic grounds the record may be assigned to the time of Sōmēśvara I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ .svasti samastabhuvanajanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāsrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḻukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattraiḻōkyamalladēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salu
ttamire manneya nelevīḍinoḷuṁ svasti samastamithyaikāntapra
vādimadakarikisōrakēsari śrīmadindraṇandipaṇḍitapādapaṁkajabhṛṁga
rappaśrīmat vādibhēruṇḍa caṁdraṇandipaṁḍitakairamaca(ṁ)ndra kīrttimayyaṁ piriya
barmmayya perggaḍe gētayyanēcagāvuṇḍa sēnabōva kētayya bharatayyanudayāditya
yya hampiseṭṭiya(ṁ) barmmayya piriyakaṁcayya māḷavayyagāvuṇḍa sōviseṭṭi guḍḍagā
vuṇḍana cāmayya masaṇaseṭṭi kūvatiḍuga hālimayya sāṁtayya dāsimayya
jannimayya koṇnayya vikramāditya mūkayyaheggaḍe jakkimayyana tamma
kēsimayya palliseṭṭi kantiyara jinnayya baddamayyanēcimayyanintivarmmoda
lāgi pādamūlaparivāra nakara mahājana gāvuṇḍagaḷiṁ pañcamaṭasthāna
ma toṁbhattaṟusāsirvvarumiḻdhuleṁka pōcaṇnana tamma noḻaṁbaseṭṭi sthāna
gurugaḻgepādapūjeyaṁ koṭṭu chatrakke mūḍaṇa poladalu biṭṭa Eṟeya ke
yi matta panneraḍu gaḻde koḷagavaydu I dharmmavanaḷidavaṁ bāṇarāsiyoḷaṁ
kurukṣētradoḷaṁ sāsirvvaru brāhmaṇarumaṁ sāsirvvaru riṣiya
rumaṁ sāsira kavileyumanaḷida brahmātiyakku ©
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasa
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . śrīmattraiḷōkyama
lla nanninoḻaṁbapallavapermmānaḍidēvara leṁka svāmisantōṣaṁ kaligaḷagaṇḍa ga
ḍiyaṁkabhīmaṁ tolagadagaṁḍa neravoḍegaṁḍa pisuṇamūgariva puseIlladāta kūṭakkoḻgaṇḍa
maṟevuge kāva caladaṁkarāma nanniyamēru leṁkara baḻuva pōcaṇnana tamma śrīmadga
ṇḍaragaṇḍa noḻaṁbaseṭṭiyuṁ padmāvatiyabbeyu parōkṣavinayakkeṁdu biṭṭa chatre . na viṣaṁ viṣa
mityāhurdēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē . viṣamēkākinaṁ haṁti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
